description: Register-driven routing with real bidirectional RTP (sipjs sip-front-proxy mimic), realized via the PORTABLE basic-call-media shape over the fake-register-proxy infra. The layout pre-REGISTERs bob1's AOR (sip:bob1@register.example) and rewrites alice's Request-URI to it with NO X-Api-Call pin; the register front proxy resolves the binding, decrements Max-Forwards, pushes its Via and record-routes the dialog (so the in-dialog BYE loops back). The same media folds as the LB+b2bua infra prove alice hears bob1 and bob1 hears alice — proving the binding-routed call carries audio both ways.
